Tweet by @fabdarice (fabda.gold)
Author bio: Gold (prev: ETH)

https://t.co/RJYI1McgSL
https://t.co/DeGjQAm0Rf
Text: Many have missed all the cool new features of x402 since v2. Here’s a recap ⬇️

✨ Networks: multi-chain (EVM, Solana, Aptos, Stellar via CAIP-2) + support for card networks & APMs
✨ Assets: ERC-20s, stablecoins (USDC/EURC), SPL + fiat rails via extensions
✨ Transport: HTTP (native 402), MCP, agent-to-agent (A2A)
✨ Facilitator (optional): abstracts complexity by verifying payments + handling settlement (onchain or fiat rails)

Payment Schemes:
✨ exact (per request)
✨ up to (metered usage)
✨ streaming (coming soon)

Extensions (where it gets powerful):
✨ Auth (SIWX / wallet-signed identity)
✨ Discovery (marketplace, pricing, reputation)
✨ Receipts (verifiable proof of payment)
✨ Gasless / sponsored transactions

Extensible by design: add new chains, assets, rails, and logic.
